rows.label: xs99110130_MSG0001
rows.name: Lin-san! Lin-san! Thank you for the meal, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110130_MSG0002
rows.name: By the way, are you making something else, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110130_MSG0004
rows.name:
It's a terrine made with foie gras,
one of Earth's three great delicacies![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110130_MSG0005
rows.name:
Tatsu doesn't know what that is,
but it looks delicious, mo~~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110130_MSG0006
rows.name: Somehow, Tatsu is hungry again, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110130_MSG0007
rows.name: Tatsu wants to eat some too, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110130_MSG0008
rows.name: Hmm, Tatsu may not be able to eat this one~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110130_MSG0011_02
rows.name: Wh-Wh-Wha— What is foie gras, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110130_MSG0013
rows.name:
Tatsu is not food, mo! Tatsu may be
delicious, but stop it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110130_MSG0015
rows.name:
You did that on purpose, mo!
Definitely on purpose, mo~~![ST:wait ]
